title: digitalis dubia f. longipedunculata
intro: Digitalis dubia f. longipedunculata is a variant of the Digitalis dubia plant, a type of foxglove species native to Europe and Asia. It contains bioactive compounds like digoxin and digitoxin, which contribute to its medicinal properties as a cardiac glycoside, affecting heart function by increasing the force of contractions and regulating heart rate. The health benefits of Digitalis dubia f. longipedunculata include its potential to treat conditions such as atrial fibrillation, congestive heart failure, and certain types of arrhythmia. The plant is traditionally prepared for medicinal use through infusion, tincture, or ointment, although it should only be used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional due to its potential toxicity.
